1.gl: in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc.
1.kj: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.
[phrase] beautiful, beauty, comely, fair(-est, one), [phrase] goodly, pleasant, well.

1.gl: a mountain or range of hills (sometimes used figuratively)
a she-goat (as strong), but masculine in plural (which also is used elliptically for goat's hair)

1.dv: or שַׂעַר; (Isaiah 7:20), from H8175 (שָׂעַר) in the sense of dishevelling;

2.gl: to ascend, intransitively (be high) or actively (mount); used in a great variety of senses, primary and secondary, literal and figurative
2.kj: arise (up), (cause to) ascend up, at once, break (the day) (up), bring (up), (cause to) burn, carry up, cast up, [phrase] shew, climb (up), (cause to, make to) come (up), cut off,

2.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
2.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
2.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

2.gl: to be (causatively, make) twinned, i.e. (figuratively) duplicate or (architectural) jointed
2.dv: a primitive root; to be complete; but used only as denominative from H8380 (תָּאוֹם),

2.gl: a tooth (as sharp); specifically  ivory; figuratively, a cliff

3.gl: the lip (as a natural boundary); by implication, language; by analogy, a margin (of a vessel, water, cloth, etc.)
3.kj: band, bank, binding, border, brim, brink, edge, language, lip, prating, (sea-)shore, side, speech, talk, (vain) words.
3.dv: or (in dual and plural) שֶׂפֶת; probably from H5595 (סָפָה) or H8192 (שָׁפָה) through the idea of termination (compare H5490 (סוֹף));

3.gl: a pasture (i.e. open field, whither cattle are driven); by implication, a desert; also speech (including its organs)
3.dv: from H1696 (דָבַר) in the sense of driving;

3.gl: in up to or over against; generally at, beside, among, behind, for, etc.
3.kj: about, at by (means of), for, over, through, up (-on), within.

3.gl: a pomegranate, the tree (from its upright growth) or the fruit (also an artificial ornament)
crimson, properly, the insect or its color, also stuff dyed with it
a string; by implication, a measuring tape
3.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to sew;

4.gl: the back of the neck (as that on which burdens are bound)
4.dv: or צַוָּר; (Nehemiah 3:5), or צַוָּרֹןlemma צַוָּרן missing vowel, corrected to צַוָּרֹן; (Song of Solomon 4:9), or (feminine) צַוָּארָה; (Micah 2:3),

4.gl: a shield (i.e. the small one or buckler); figuratively, a protector; also the scaly hide of the crocodile
4.kj: [idiom] armed, buckler, defence, ruler, [phrase] scale, shield.
4.dv: also (in plural) feminine מְגִנָּה; from H1598 (גָּנַן);

4.gl: a tower (from its size or height); by analogy, a rostrum; figuratively, a (pyramidal) bed of flowers
4.kj: castle, flower, tower. Compare the names following.
4.dv: also (in plural) feminine מִגְדָּלָה; from H1431 (גָּדַל);

4.kj: champion, chief, [idiom] excel, giant, man, mighty (man, one), strong (man), valiant man.
4.dv: or גִּבֹּר; (shortened) intensive from the same as H1397 (גֶּבֶר);

4.gl: hence (the ox's head being the first letter of the alphabet, and this eventually used as a numeral) a thousand

4.kj: (begin to) build(-er), obtain children, make, repair, set (up), [idiom] surely.

5.gl: a twin (in plural only), literally or figuratively

to close up; especially to seal

13.kj: accompanying, against, and, as ([idiom] long as), before, beside, by (reason of), for all, from (among, between), in, like, more than, of, (un-) to, with(-al).
